paneContent:
● Acknowledged — broadcast two-way active with Leader, Form, Data, opal-warbler, Scaffold, Charts, Data. Standing
  by.


❯ Branding is a bit too... ligth and bubbly? Gradients a bit annoying if I'm honest, and you're lacking contrast on
   the text at places


● Edit Branding.jsx +17 -26
  └ src/prototypes/main.folder/StartupSignup/Branding.jsx


● update summary widget + save output (shell)
  │ export STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:1236 STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo
  │ STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-bqdgr2
  │ curl -s -m 5 -X PATCH "$STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL/_storyboard/canvas/widget" \
  │ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  │ -d '{"name":"storyboard-demo","widgetId":"markdown-xpnck7","props":{"content":"### Branding.jsx …
  └ 12 lines...


● Toned it down. Changes:

   - Removed all gradients (background + avatar) and the blurred orb decorations
   - Solid indigo-950 background — flat, calm
   - Body text is now white (was indigo-100/90 and indigo-50 — washed out)
   - Indigo-500 used only as small accents (logo tile, check bullets, avatar) — no more translucent white/15
  ring-on-glass stuff
   - Testimonial is a quiet bordered card (border-indigo-800 on indigo-900/60) instead of glassmorphism

  Same content and layout; just calmer and readable. Summary widget on canvas updated.
